race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Extra Places 'National Hunt' Novices' Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner catchintsavo (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Catchintsavo with 42.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Catchintsavo > Piping Rock, but actual result was Catchintsavo (IRE) > Five Bar Gate (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
